legs.name: create_request
legs.detail: Taker opens the request; the full ask is escrowed on-chain.

legs.name: submit_quote
legs.detail: The autonomous maker priced and signed this quote without any human in the loop.

legs.name: fund_quote
legs.detail: It escrowed its own wCOSMO against the quote — skin in the game, machine-decided.

legs.name: accept_quote
legs.detail: Taker accepts within the 60-second quote validity window.

legs.name: execute_settlement
legs.detail: The autonomous maker settled both legs atomically, well before the deadline. Security deposit untouched.

legs.name: create_request
legs.detail: A second request — this one was deliberately never accepted.

legs.name: submit_quote
legs.detail: The autonomous maker quoted it within seconds anyway.

legs.name: fund_quote
legs.detail: And escrowed its side in full.

legs.name: reclaim_unaccepted_quote
legs.detail: After the request expired unaccepted, it reclaimed its own escrow — no funds stranded, no human involved.
